title: Aeon Flux
description: love love love.

title: Battle Royale
description: One of my favourite childhood films. I loved Gogo Yubari in kill bill.

title: Alice in the Cities 1974
description: The actress in this film looks and acts identical to my childhood best friend. I love Wim Wenders.

title: All About Lily Chou Chou
description: Perfect original soundtrack

title: The Internet's Own Boy: The Story of Aaron Swartz 2014
description: Haven't had any media leave such an impact on me and my outlook towards my profession as this. I find it silly that I'm crying over the death of someone 10 years after their passing, but more so surprised that now is my first time coming across Aaron Swartz and the whirlwind of internet politics at the start of this century. Crazy how relatively recent this was, I wish I was old enough to comprehend it at the time. Forever an inspiration, taken far too soon.

title: Coffee and Cigarettes
description: Craziest casting I've seen to this day, all my favourites in one place!

title: Love & Pop
description: Tugs at the heart strings the same way as Lilya 4-ever.

title: La Haine
description: So cool.

title: 100 Yen Love
description: Amazing character arc and better than any manosphere motivation you can get.

title: Buffalo 66
description: Greatest romance movie <3 just kidding I just love Vincent

title: Videodrome
description: My only points of reference towards James Woods is this and family guy...

title: Superbad
description: I think of at least one quote from this movie every day for the past 12 years.

title: Ghost World
description: Basically a live action Daria. In high school I thought it was so me.

title: Pieces Of April
description: I love anything and all Magnetic Fields

title: Night on Earth
description: Jim Jarmusch gives me exactly everything I ever need from a movie.

title: Landscape Suicide 1986
description: Benning's films feel like he stole my memories to use as footage. It is touching to see the places where I grew up be portrayed in such a purposeful way. Deeply nostalgic, almost to the point of discomfort. My nose started bleeding 40 minutes in, which only happens to movies that strongly affect me.

title: Spun
description: I don't usually like dark comedy but this one is so over the top I love it.

title: Analife
description: Such amazing and unique way of showing the story. I have never seen anything like it.

title: Anima Mundi
description: My mom would always put this on as kids. I always cried when the flower ate the bee </3.

title: Hundreds of Beavers
description: Absolutely genius. Haven't seen my dad chuckle this hard in a while.

title: The Irony of Fate
description: New Years classic have to watch every year.

title: The Last Angel of History
description: Astounded by the inner-workings of Sun Ra's brain.

title: ¡Átame! (Tie Me Up! Tie Me Down!)
description: Yes Almodóvar! Yes Antonio!

title: Lovers on a Bridge
description: Went to Paris the summer I watched this. They had a Lars Von Trier marathon at the cinema and I got to experience being loved on the bridge.

title: Serial Experiments Lain
description: Me!

title: Angels Egg
description: A masterpiece.

title: Greatest Teacher Onizuka
description: He is good and pure!! Just misunderstood.. He cares when no one else does..
